title: Bonds Are Screaming “Recession.” That's Great News For One Top Sector.
text: The 10-2 year treasury yield spread is close to zero. Here's what you should do about this warning sign of a coming recession.

title: MLB reaches a $125 million sponsorship deal with Capital One
text: Capital One has become the "official bank and credit card partner" for Major League Baseball, according to an announcement Monday.

title: Capital One: Discounted Valuation May Outweigh Headwinds
text: Capital One trades at the historic lows of its Price/Earnings channel after the stock price fell 25% from highs.

title: Auto Dealers Lag Other Retailers At Online Selling: Capital One Survey
text: Auto dealers are patting themselves on the back for accelerating into online retailing. Not so fast, consumers said in a Capital One survey.

title: Kohl's (KSS) Extended Deal With Capital One to Fuel Growth
text: Kohl's (KSS) reveals the extension of its credit card program deal with Capital One Financial Corporation's subsidiary - Capital One, National Association. The extension will enhance customers' experiences.

title: Capital One's Curious Valuation Seems To Be Predicting Tougher Times
text: Capital One's credit metrics (auto and card NCOs and delinquencies) are still well above historical norms, though they are worsening.

title: Capital One Shows Good Promise For The Future
text: Capital One has posted a stellar year, with topline growth and an exploding bottom line.

title: Kohl's and Capital One Announce Multi-Year Extension of Credit Card Partnership
text: Companies Agree to Extend Private Label Credit Card Offering and Explore New Opportunities Together MCLEAN, Va. , March 18, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Kohl's (NYSE: KSS) and Capital One, National Association, a subsidiary of Capital One Financial Corporation (NYSE: COF), today announced a multi-year extension of their credit card program agreement.

title: Higher Interest Rates Are Great for This Stock
text: Capital One should see a significant boost in interest income if rates rise.

title: Wayfair Partners With Capital One for Wayfair Pro Credit Offerings
text: Online furniture retailer Wayfair's business program, Wayfair Professional, has partnered with Capital One on a credit program for its Wayfair Professional members, according to a joint press release Thursday (March 3). Capital One Trade Credit will introduce a Wayfair Professional Credit Card with rewards and a Wayfair Professional Flex Account with extended payment terms for […]

title: Wayfair and Capital One partner for professional credit program
text: Wayfair Inc. W, -1.13% and Capital One Financial Corp. COF, +0.37% have partnered to launch the Wayfair Professional Credit Card and the Wayfair Professional Flex Account, which offers extended payment terms. Wayfair brands include the namesake, AllModern and Joss & Main.

title: Wayfair Introduces Partnership With Capital One to Provide Credit Solutions to Wayfair Professional Customers
text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Wayfair Introduces Partnership with Capital One to Provide Credit Solutions to Wayfair Professional Customers

title: Capital One (COF) Gains But Lags Market: What You Should Know
text: Capital One (COF) closed the most recent trading day at $141.20, moving +0.37% from the previous trading session.
